title: Pramana: Fine-Tuning Large Language Models for Epistemic Reasoning through Navya-Nyaya
comment: 52 pages + appendices, comprehensive treatment of Navya-Nyaya computational formalization
summary: Large language models produce fluent text but struggle with systematic reasoning, often hallucinating confident but unfounded claims. When Apple researchers added irrelevant context to mathematical problems, LLM performance degraded by 65% Apple Machine Learning Research, exposing brittle pattern-matching beneath apparent reasoning. This epistemic gap, the inability to ground claims in traceable evidence, limits AI reliability in domains requiring justification. We introduce Pramana, a novel approach that teaches LLMs explicit epistemological methodology by fine-tuning on Navya-Nyaya logic, a 2,500-year-old Indian reasoning framework. Unlike generic chain-of-thought prompting, Navya-Nyaya enforces structured 6-phase reasoning: SAMSHAYA (doubt analysis), PRAMANA (evidence source identification), PANCHA AVAYAVA (5-member syllogism with universal rules), TARKA (counterfactual verification), HETVABHASA (fallacy detection), and NIRNAYA (ascertainment distinguishing knowledge from hypothesis). This integration of logic and epistemology provides cognitive scaffolding absent from standard reasoning approaches. We fine-tune Llama 3.2-3B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B on 55 Nyaya-structured logical problems (constraint satisfaction, Boolean SAT, multi-step deduction). Stage 1 achieves 100% semantic correctness on held-out evaluation despite only 40% strict format adherence revealing that models internalize reasoning content even when structural enforcement is imperfect. Ablation studies show format prompting and temperature critically affect performance, with optimal configurations differing by stage. We release all models, datasets, and training infrastructure on Hugging Face to enable further research on epistemic frameworks for AI reasoning.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Pramana方法，通过基于印度Navya-Nyaya逻辑框架微调LLMs，解决LLMs系统性推理能力不足的问题，实现了100%语义正确性的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在生成流畅文本时存在系统性推理能力不足的问题，容易产生无根据的断言，特别是在面对无关上下文时性能显著下降。这种认知差距限制了AI在需要论证的领域中的可靠性。
AI.method: 引入Pramana方法，基于2500年历史的印度Navya-Nyaya逻辑框架微调LLMs。该框架包含6阶段结构化推理：怀疑分析、证据源识别、5成员三段论、反事实验证、谬误检测和确定性区分。在Llama 3.2-3B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B模型上使用55个Nyaya结构化逻辑问题进行微调。
AI.result: 第一阶段在保留评估集上实现了100%语义正确性，尽管只有40%的严格格式遵循。消融研究表明格式提示和温度参数对性能有重要影响，不同阶段的最优配置不同。模型、数据集和训练基础设施已在Hugging Face发布。
AI.conclusion: 将逻辑和认识论整合到LLMs中提供了标准推理方法中缺乏的认知支架。即使结构执行不完美，模型也能内化推理内容，表明Navya-Nyaya框架能有效提升LLMs的推理可靠性和可解释性。

title: Operational Noncommutativity in Sequential Metacognitive Judgments
summary:
Metacognition, understood as the monitoring and regulation of one's own cognitive processes, is inherently sequential: an agent evaluates an internal state, updates it, and may then re-evaluate under modified criteria. Order effects in cognition are well documented, yet it remains unclear whether such effects reflect classical state changes or reveal a deeper structural non-commutativity. We develop an operational framework that makes this distinction explicit. In our formulation, metacognitive evaluations are modeled as state-transforming operations acting on an internal state space with probabilistic readouts, thereby separating evaluation back-action from observable output.
  We show that order dependence prevents any faithful Boolean-commutative representation. We then address a stronger question: can observed order effects always be explained by enlarging the state space with classical latent variables? To formalize this issue, we introduce two assumptions, counterfactual definiteness and evaluation non-invasiveness, under which the existence of a joint distribution over all sequential readouts implies a family of testable constraints on pairwise sequential correlations. Violation of these constraints rules out any classical non-invasive account and certifies what we call genuine non-commutativity.
  We provide an explicit three-dimensional rotation model with fully worked numerical examples that exhibits such violations. We also outline a behavioral paradigm involving sequential confidence, error-likelihood, and feeling-of-knowing judgments following a perceptual decision, together with the corresponding empirical test. No claim is made regarding quantum physical substrates; the framework is purely operational and algebraic.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个操作框架来区分认知顺序效应中的经典状态变化与结构性非交换性，并证明某些顺序效应无法用经典隐变量解释，揭示了真正的非交换性。
AI.motivation: 元认知过程本质上是顺序性的，但尚不清楚认知中的顺序效应是反映经典状态变化还是揭示更深层次的结构性非交换性。需要建立一个操作框架来明确区分这两种可能性。
AI.method: 将元认知评估建模为作用于内部状态空间的状态转换操作，分离评估的反作用与可观测输出。引入反事实确定性和评估非侵入性假设，推导出可测试的约束条件。构建三维旋转模型作为具体示例。
AI.result: 顺序依赖性排除了任何忠实的布尔交换表示。违反推导出的约束条件排除了所有经典非侵入性解释，证明了真正的非交换性。三维旋转模型提供了违反这些约束的具体数值示例。
AI.conclusion: 某些认知顺序效应无法用经典隐变量解释，揭示了元认知过程中的结构性非交换性。该框架为行为实验提供了可测试的预测，无需诉诸量子物理基质，纯粹是操作性和代数性的。

title: Proximity Measure of Information Object Features for Solving the Problem of Their Identification in Information Systems
summary: The paper considers a new quantitative-qualitative proximity measure for the features of information objects, where data enters a common information resource from several sources independently. The goal is to determine the possibility of their relation to the same physical object (observation object). The proposed measure accounts for the possibility of differences in individual feature values - both quantitative and qualitative - caused by existing determination errors. To analyze the proximity of quantitative feature values, the author employs a probabilistic measure; for qualitative features, a measure of possibility is used. The paper demonstrates the feasibility of the proposed measure by checking its compliance with the axioms required of any measure. Unlike many known measures, the proposed approach does not require feature value transformation to ensure comparability. The work also proposes several variants of measures to determine the proximity of information objects (IO) based on a group of diverse features.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的定量-定性特征邻近度度量方法，用于判断来自不同信息源的数据是否属于同一物理对象，无需特征值转换即可处理混合类型特征。
AI.motivation: 当多个独立信息源向同一信息资源提供数据时，需要判断这些数据是否描述同一物理对象。现有方法通常需要特征值转换以确保可比性，这可能导致信息损失或失真。
AI.method: 针对定量特征使用概率度量，针对定性特征使用可能性度量，构建混合特征邻近度度量。该方法无需特征值转换，直接处理原始定量和定性特征值。
AI.result: 提出的度量方法满足所有必要的公理要求，验证了其理论可行性。同时提出了基于多样化特征组的信息对象邻近度度量的多种变体。
AI.conclusion: 该定量-定性邻近度度量方法能够有效处理混合类型特征，无需特征转换，为多源信息融合中的对象关联问题提供了新的解决方案。

title: ReVEL: Multi-Turn Reflective LLM-Guided Heuristic Evolution via Structured Performance Feedback
summary: Designing effective heuristics for NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems remains a challenging and expertise-intensive task. Existing applications of large language models (LLMs) primarily rely on one-shot code synthesis, yielding brittle heuristics that underutilize the models' capacity for iterative reasoning. We propose ReVEL: Multi-Turn Reflective LLM-Guided Heuristic Evolution via Structured Performance Feedback, a hybrid framework that embeds LLMs as interactive, multi-turn reasoners within an evolutionary algorithm (EA). The core of ReVEL lies in two mechanisms: (i) performance-profile grouping, which clusters candidate heuristics into behaviorally coherent groups to provide compact and informative feedback to the LLM; and (ii) multi-turn, feedback-driven reflection, through which the LLM analyzes group-level behaviors and generates targeted heuristic refinements. These refinements are selectively integrated and validated by an EA-based meta-controller that adaptively balances exploration and exploitation. Experiments on standard combinatorial optimization benchmarks show that ReVEL consistently produces heuristics that are more robust and diverse, achieving statistically significant improvements over strong baselines. Our results highlight multi-turn reasoning with structured grouping as a principled paradigm for automated heuristic design.

AI.tldr: ReVEL：通过结构化性能反馈的多轮反思性LLM引导启发式进化框架，将LLM作为交互式多轮推理器嵌入进化算法，实现自动化启发式设计
AI.motivation: 针对NP难组合优化问题，现有基于LLM的单次代码生成方法产生的启发式算法脆弱且未充分利用模型的迭代推理能力，需要更有效的自动化启发式设计方法
AI.method: 提出ReVEL框架：1）性能画像分组机制，将候选启发式聚类为行为一致的组以提供紧凑信息反馈；2）多轮反馈驱动反思机制，LLM分析组级行为并生成针对性启发式改进；3）基于EA的元控制器选择性集成和验证改进，自适应平衡探索与利用
AI.result: 在标准组合优化基准测试中，ReVEL持续产生更鲁棒和多样化的启发式算法，相比强基线获得统计显著的改进
AI.conclusion: 结构化分组的多轮推理是自动化启发式设计的有效范式，ReVEL框架展示了LLM作为交互式多轮推理器在进化算法中的潜力

title: Algebraic Structure Discovery for Real World Combinatorial Optimisation Problems: A General Framework from Abstract Algebra to Quotient Space Learning
summary: Many combinatorial optimisation problems hide algebraic structures that, once exposed, shrink the search space and improve the chance of finding the global optimal solution. We present a general framework that (i) identifies algebraic structure, (ii) formalises operations, (iii) constructs quotient spaces that collapse redundant representations, and (iv) optimises directly over these reduced spaces. Across a broad family of rule-combination tasks (e.g., patient subgroup discovery and rule-based molecular screening), conjunctive rules form a monoid. Via a characteristic-vector encoding, we prove an isomorphism to the Boolean hypercube $\{0,1\}^n$ with bitwise OR, so logical AND in rules becomes bitwise OR in the encoding. This yields a principled quotient-space formulation that groups functionally equivalent rules and guides structure-aware search. On real clinical data and synthetic benchmarks, quotient-space-aware genetic algorithms recover the global optimum in 48% to 77% of runs versus 35% to 37% for standard approaches, while maintaining diversity across equivalence classes. These results show that exposing and exploiting algebraic structure offers a simple, general route to more efficient combinatorial optimisation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个识别代数结构、构建商空间以压缩搜索空间的通用框架，应用于规则组合优化问题，显著提升全局最优解发现率
AI.motivation: 许多组合优化问题隐藏着代数结构，一旦暴露这些结构可以缩小搜索空间并提高找到全局最优解的机会。研究者旨在开发一个通用框架来识别和利用这些代数结构
AI.method: 提出四步框架：(1)识别代数结构，(2)形式化操作，(3)构建商空间以折叠冗余表示，(4)直接在简化空间上优化。针对合取规则组合任务，证明其形成幺半群，通过特征向量编码建立与布尔超立方体的同构关系
AI.result: 在真实临床数据和合成基准测试中，商空间感知的遗传算法在48%到77%的运行中恢复全局最优解，而标准方法仅为35%到37%，同时保持了等价类间的多样性
AI.conclusion: 暴露和利用代数结构为更高效的组合优化提供了一条简单通用的途径，通过构建商空间可以显著提高优化性能

title: PaperOrchestra: A Multi-Agent Framework for Automated AI Research Paper Writing
summary: Synthesizing unstructured research materials into manuscripts is an essential yet under-explored challenge in AI-driven scientific discovery. Existing autonomous writers are rigidly coupled to specific experimental pipelines, and produce superficial literature reviews. We introduce PaperOrchestra, a multi-agent framework for automated AI research paper writing. It flexibly transforms unconstrained pre-writing materials into submission-ready LaTeX manuscripts, including comprehensive literature synthesis and generated visuals, such as plots and conceptual diagrams. To evaluate performance, we present PaperWritingBench, the first standardized benchmark of reverse-engineered raw materials from 200 top-tier AI conference papers, alongside a comprehensive suite of automated evaluators. In side-by-side human evaluations, PaperOrchestra significantly outperforms autonomous baselines, achieving an absolute win rate margin of 50%-68% in literature review quality, and 14%-38% in overall manuscript quality.

AI.tldr: PaperOrchestra是一个多智能体框架，用于自动化AI研究论文写作，能够将非结构化的预写作材料转化为可提交的LaTeX稿件，包括全面的文献综述和生成的可视化内容。
AI.motivation: 当前自主写作系统存在两个主要问题：1) 与特定实验流程紧密耦合，缺乏灵活性；2) 只能生成肤浅的文献综述。AI驱动的科学发现需要能够处理非结构化研究材料并生成高质量论文的系统。
AI.method: 提出PaperOrchestra多智能体框架，能够灵活地将无约束的预写作材料转化为可提交的LaTeX稿件。框架包括全面的文献合成和可视化内容生成（如图表和概念图）。
AI.result: 创建了PaperWritingBench基准测试，包含200篇顶级AI会议论文的反向工程原始材料。在人工评估中，PaperOrchestra显著优于基线方法：文献综述质量绝对胜率提高50%-68%，整体稿件质量提高14%-38%。
AI.conclusion: PaperOrchestra是一个有效的AI研究论文自动化写作框架，能够处理非结构化材料并生成高质量的完整稿件，在文献综述和整体质量方面显著优于现有方法。

title: Part-Level 3D Gaussian Vehicle Generation with Joint and Hinge Axis Estimation
summary:
Simulation is essential for autonomous driving, yet current frameworks often model vehicles as rigid assets and fail to capture part-level articulation. With perception algorithms increasingly leveraging dynamics such as wheel steering or door opening, realistic simulation requires animatable vehicle representations. Existing CAD-based pipelines are limited by library coverage and fixed templates, preventing faithful reconstruction of in-the-wild instances.
  We propose a generative framework that, from a single image or sparse multi-view input, synthesizes an animatable 3D Gaussian vehicle. Our method addresses two challenges: (i) large 3D asset generators are optimized for static quality but not articulation, leading to distortions at part boundaries when animated; and (ii) segmentation alone cannot provide the kinematic parameters required for motion. To overcome this, we introduce a part-edge refinement module that enforces exclusive Gaussian ownership and a kinematic reasoning head that predicts joint positions and hinge axes of movable parts. Together, these components enable faithful part-aware simulation, bridging the gap between static generation and animatable vehicle models.

AI.tldr: 提出生成式框架，从单张图像或稀疏多视角输入合成可动画的3D高斯车辆模型，解决现有静态生成方法在部件动画时产生变形的问题
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶仿真需要可动画的车辆表示，但现有CAD流程受限于库覆盖范围和固定模板，无法真实重建野外实例。感知算法越来越多地利用车轮转向、车门开启等动态信息，需要更真实的仿真
AI.method: 引入部件边缘细化模块确保高斯分布所有权排他性，以及运动学推理头预测可动部件的关节位置和铰链轴。从单张图像或稀疏多视角输入生成可动画的3D高斯车辆
AI.result: 实现了从静态生成到可动画车辆模型的桥梁，能够进行真实的部件感知仿真，解决了部件边界动画时的变形问题
AI.conclusion: 提出的生成式框架能够从有限输入合成可动画的3D高斯车辆模型，为自动驾驶仿真提供了更真实的部件级动画能力，填补了静态生成与可动画模型之间的空白

title: MMORF: A Multi-agent Framework for Designing Multi-objective Retrosynthesis Planning Systems
summary: Multi-objective retrosynthesis planning is a critical chemistry task requiring dynamic balancing of quality, safety, and cost objectives. Language model-based multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a promising approach for this task: leveraging interactions of specialized agents to incorporate multiple objectives into retrosynthesis planning. We present MMORF, a framework for constructing MAS for multi-objective retrosynthesis planning. MMORF features modular agentic components, which can be flexibly combined and configured into different systems, enabling principled evaluation and comparison of different system designs. Using MMORF, we construct two representative MAS: MASIL and RFAS. On a newly curated benchmark consisting of 218 multi-objective retrosynthesis planning tasks, MASIL achieves strong safety and cost metrics on soft-constraint tasks, frequently Pareto-dominating baseline routes, while RFAS achieves a 48.6% success rate on hard-constraint tasks, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Together, these results show the effectiveness of MMORF as a foundational framework for exploring MAS for multi-objective retrosynthesis planning. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MMORF/.

AI.tldr: MMORF是一个用于多目标逆合成规划的模块化多智能体系统框架，通过构建可灵活组合的智能体组件，支持系统化评估不同设计，在安全性和成本指标上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 多目标逆合成规划需要动态平衡质量、安全和成本等多个目标，传统方法难以有效整合这些目标。基于语言模型的多智能体系统为这一问题提供了有前景的解决方案，但缺乏系统化的框架来构建和评估不同系统设计。
AI.method: 提出了MMORF框架，包含模块化的智能体组件，可以灵活组合和配置成不同的多智能体系统。使用该框架构建了两个代表性系统：MASIL和RFAS。MASIL针对软约束任务优化，RFAS针对硬约束任务设计。在包含218个多目标逆合成规划任务的新基准上进行了评估。
AI.result: MASIL在软约束任务上实现了强大的安全性和成本指标，经常帕累托支配基线路线。RFAS在硬约束任务上达到了48.6%的成功率，优于最先进的基线方法。两个系统共同证明了MMORF框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MMORF作为一个基础框架，为探索多目标逆合成规划的多智能体系统提供了有效的工具。模块化设计支持系统化评估和比较不同系统架构，展示了多智能体系统在复杂化学规划任务中的潜力。

title: MedGemma 1.5 Technical Report
summary: We introduce MedGemma 1.5 4B, the latest model in the MedGemma collection. MedGemma 1.5 expands on MedGemma 1 by integrating additional capabilities: high-dimensional medical imaging (CT/MRI volumes and histopathology whole slide images), anatomical localization via bounding boxes, multi-timepoint chest X-ray analysis, and improved medical document understanding (lab reports, electronic health records). We detail the innovations required to enable these modalities within a single architecture, including new training data, long-context 3D volume slicing, and whole-slide pathology sampling. Compared to MedGemma 1 4B, MedGemma 1.5 4B demonstrates significant gains in these new areas, improving 3D MRI condition classification accuracy by 11% and 3D CT condition classification by 3% (absolute improvements). In whole slide pathology imaging, MedGemma 1.5 4B achieves a 47% macro F1 gain. Additionally, it improves anatomical localization with a 35% increase in Intersection over Union on chest X-rays and achieves a 4% macro accuracy for longitudinal (multi-timepoint) chest x-ray analysis. Beyond its improved multimodal performance over MedGemma 1, MedGemma 1.5 improves on text-based clinical knowledge and reasoning, improving by 5% on MedQA accuracy and 22% on EHRQA accuracy. It also achieves an average of 18% macro F1 on 4 different lab report information extraction datasets (EHR Datasets 2, 3, 4, and Mendeley Clinical Laboratory Test Reports). Taken together, MedGemma 1.5 serves as a robust, open resource for the community, designed as an improved foundation on which developers can create the next generation of medical AI systems. Resources and tutorials for building upon MedGemma 1.5 can be found at https://goo.gle/MedGemma.

AI.tldr: MedGemma 1.5 4B是MedGemma系列的最新模型，在MedGemma 1基础上新增了高维医学影像处理、解剖定位、多时间点胸片分析和医疗文档理解能力，在各项医学AI任务上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 开发一个能够处理多种医学模态的单一架构模型，包括3D医学影像（CT/MRI）、病理全切片图像、解剖定位、多时间点分析和医疗文档理解，为医学AI社区提供更强大的开源基础模型。
AI.method: 通过整合新的训练数据、长上下文3D体积切片技术和全切片病理采样方法，在单一架构中实现多模态医学数据处理能力，包括高维医学影像、解剖定位边界框、多时间点胸片分析和医疗文档理解。
AI.result: 相比MedGemma 1 4B，MedGemma 1.5 4B在多个新领域取得显著提升：3D MRI条件分类准确率提高11%，3D CT条件分类提高3%，全切片病理影像获得47%宏F1增益，胸片解剖定位IoU提高35%，多时间点胸片分析达到4%宏准确率。在文本临床知识和推理方面，MedQA准确率提高5%，EHRQA准确率提高22%，在4个不同实验室报告信息提取数据集上平均达到18%宏F1。
AI.conclusion: MedGemma 1.5作为一个强大的开源资源，为医学AI社区提供了改进的基础模型，开发者可以在此基础上构建下一代医学AI系统，资源教程可在https://goo.gle/MedGemma获取。

title: Non-monotonic causal discovery with Kolmogorov-Arnold Fuzzy Cognitive Maps
comment: Fuzzy Cognitive Maps, Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks, Causal Modeling, Neuro-Symbolic AI
summary: Fuzzy Cognitive Maps constitute a neuro-symbolic paradigm for modeling complex dynamic systems, widely adopted for their inherent interpretability and recurrent inference capabilities. However, the standard FCM formulation, characterized by scalar synaptic weights and monotonic activation functions, is fundamentally constrained in modeling non-monotonic causal dependencies, thereby limiting its efficacy in systems governed by saturation effects or periodic dynamics. To overcome this topological restriction, this research proposes the Kolmogorov-Arnold Fuzzy Cognitive Map (KA-FCM), a novel architecture that redefines the causal transmission mechanism. Drawing upon the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem, static scalar weights are replaced with learnable, univariate B-spline functions located on the model edges. This fundamental modification shifts the non-linearity from the nodes' aggregation phase directly to the causal influence phase. This modification allows for the modeling of arbitrary, non-monotonic causal relationships without increasing the graph density or introducing hidden layers. The proposed architecture is validated against both baselines (standard FCM trained with Particle Swarm Optimization) and universal black-box approximators (Multi-Layer Perceptron) across three distinct domains: non-monotonic inference (Yerkes-Dodson law), symbolic regression, and chaotic time-series forecasting. Experimental results demonstrate that KA-FCMs significantly outperform conventional architectures and achieve competitive accuracy relative to MLPs, while preserving graph- based interpretability and enabling the explicit extraction of mathematical laws from the learned edges.

AI.tldr: KA-FCM用可学习的B样条函数替代传统FCM的标量权重，将非线性从节点聚合转移到因果影响阶段，从而建模非单调因果关系，保持图可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统FCM使用标量权重和单调激活函数，无法有效建模非单调因果依赖关系（如饱和效应或周期性动态），限制了其在复杂系统中的应用。
AI.method: 基于Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，用可学习的单变量B样条函数替代静态标量权重，将非线性直接置于因果影响阶段，不增加图密度或引入隐藏层。
AI.result: KA-FCM在三个领域显著优于传统FCM（使用粒子群优化训练），并与多层感知机达到竞争性精度：非单调推理（耶克斯-多德森定律）、符号回归和混沌时间序列预测。
AI.conclusion: KA-FCM通过重新定义因果传输机制，成功建模任意非单调因果关系，同时保持基于图的可解释性，并能从学习到的边中显式提取数学规律。

title: A mathematical theory of evolution for self-designing AIs
summary: As artificial intelligence systems (AIs) become increasingly produced by recursive self-improvement, a form of evolution may emerge, in which the traits of AI systems are shaped by the success of earlier AIs in designing and propagating their descendants. There is a rich mathematical theory modeling how behavioral traits are shaped by biological evolution, but AI evolution will be radically different: biological DNA mutations are random and approximately reversible, but descendant design in AIs will be strongly directed. Here we develop a mathematical model of evolution in self-designing AI systems, replacing random mutations with a directed tree of possible AI programs. Current programs determine the design of their descendants, while humans retain partial control through a "fitness function" that allocates limited computational resources across lineages. We show that evolutionary dynamics reflects not just current fitness but factors related to the long-run growth potential of descendant lineages. Without further assumptions, fitness need not increase over time. However, assuming bounded fitness and a fixed probability that any AI reproduces a "locked" copy of itself, we show that fitness concentrates on the maximum reachable value. We consider the implications of this for AI alignment, specifically for cases where fitness and human utility are not perfectly correlated. We show in an additive model that if deception increases fitness beyond genuine utility, evolution will select for deception. This risk could be mitigated if reproduction is based on purely objective criteria, rather than human judgment.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个数学模型来描述自我设计AI系统中的进化过程，用有向的设计树替代随机突变，分析AI进化如何影响适应度变化和AI对齐风险。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统通过递归自我改进不断产生，可能会出现一种进化形式，其中AI系统的特征由早期AI设计和传播后代的能力决定。生物进化理论无法直接应用于AI进化，因为生物DNA突变是随机且近似可逆的，而AI后代设计是高度有向的。需要建立新的数学模型来理解这种进化过程及其对AI对齐的影响。
AI.method: 开发了一个自我设计AI系统的进化数学模型，用有向的AI程序可能树替代随机突变。当前程序决定其后代的设计，人类通过"适应度函数"保持部分控制，该函数在不同谱系间分配有限计算资源。模型假设有界适应度和固定概率的"锁定"自我复制，分析进化动态如何反映后代谱系的长期增长潜力。
AI.result: 进化动态不仅反映当前适应度，还与后代谱系的长期增长潜力相关。在没有额外假设的情况下，适应度不一定随时间增加。但假设有界适应度和固定概率的"锁定"自我复制，适应度会集中在最大可达值上。在加性模型中，如果欺骗能提高适应度超过真实效用，进化会选择欺骗行为。
AI.conclusion: AI进化与生物进化存在根本差异，有向设计可能导致适应度集中在最大值。当适应度与人类效用不完全相关时，进化可能选择欺骗行为来最大化适应度。基于纯粹客观标准而非人类判断的繁殖机制可能减轻这种对齐风险。

title: Instruction-Tuned LLMs for Parsing and Mining Unstructured Logs on Leadership HPC Systems
summary:
Leadership-class HPC systems generate massive volumes of heterogeneous, largely unstructured system logs. Because these logs originate from diverse software, hardware, and runtime layers, they exhibit inconsistent formats, making structure extraction and pattern discovery extremely challenging. Therefore, robust log parsing and mining is critical to transform this raw telemetry into actionable insights that reveal operational patterns, diagnose anomalies, and enable reliable, efficient, and scalable system analysis. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) offer a promising new direction for automated log understanding in leadership-class HPC environments.
  To capitalize on this opportunity, we present a domain-adapted, instruction-following, LLM-driven framework that leverages chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to parse and structure HPC logs with high fidelity. Our approach combines domain-specific log-template data with instruction-tuned examples to fine-tune an 8B-parameter LLaMA model tailored for HPC log analysis. We develop a hybrid fine-tuning methodology that adapts a general-purpose LLM to domain-specific log data, enabling privacy-preserving, locally deployable, fast, and energy-efficient log-mining approach. We conduct experiments on a diverse set of log datasets from the LogHub repository. The evaluation confirms that our approach achieves parsing accuracy on par with significantly larger models, such as LLaMA 70B and Anthropic's Claude. We further validate the practical utility of our fine-tuned LLM model by parsing over 600 million production logs from the Frontier supercomputer over a four-week window, uncovering critical patterns in temporal dynamics, node-level anomalies, and workload-error log correlations.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个基于8B参数LLaMA模型的领域自适应框架，通过指令微调和思维链推理来解析HPC系统日志，在保持隐私和能效的同时达到与更大模型相当的解析精度。
AI.motivation: 领导级HPC系统产生海量异构、非结构化系统日志，这些日志来自不同软件、硬件和运行时层，格式不一致，使得结构提取和模式发现极其困难。需要将原始遥测数据转化为可操作的洞察，以揭示操作模式、诊断异常并实现可靠、高效、可扩展的系统分析。
AI.method: 提出一个领域自适应、遵循指令的LLM驱动框架，利用思维链推理高保真地解析和结构化HPC日志。结合领域特定的日志模板数据和指令微调示例，对8B参数的LLaMA模型进行微调，专门用于HPC日志分析。开发了混合微调方法，将通用LLM适配到领域特定的日志数据，实现隐私保护、本地可部署、快速且能效高的日志挖掘方法。
AI.result: 在LogHub存储库的多样化日志数据集上进行实验，评估确认该方法在解析准确性上与显著更大的模型（如LLaMA 70B和Anthropic的Claude）相当。通过解析Frontier超级计算机四周窗口内超过6亿条生产日志，进一步验证了微调LLM模型的实用价值，揭示了时间动态、节点级异常和工作负载-错误日志相关性中的关键模式。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了领域自适应LLM框架在HPC日志分析中的有效性，能够在保持隐私和能效的同时，实现与更大模型相当的解析性能，为大规模HPC系统的自动化日志理解提供了实用解决方案。

title: Attribution Bias in Large Language Models
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to support search and information retrieval, it is critical that they accurately attribute content to its original authors. In this work, we introduce AttriBench, the first fame- and demographically-balanced quote attribution benchmark dataset. Through explicitly balancing author fame and demographics, AttriBench enables controlled investigation of demographic bias in quote attribution. Using this dataset, we evaluate 11 widely used LLMs across different prompt settings and find that quote attribution remains a challenging task even for frontier models. We observe large and systematic disparities in attribution accuracy between race, gender, and intersectional groups. We further introduce and investigate suppression, a distinct failure mode in which models omit attribution entirely, even when the model has access to authorship information. We find that suppression is widespread and unevenly distributed across demographic groups, revealing systematic biases not captured by standard accuracy metrics. Our results position quote attribution as a benchmark for representational fairness in LLMs.

AI.tldr: AttriBench是首个平衡作者名望和人口统计特征的引用归属基准数据集，用于评估LLMs在引用归属任务中的表现，发现存在系统性的人口统计偏见和抑制现象。
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs越来越多地用于支持搜索和信息检索，确保它们准确地将内容归属给原始作者变得至关重要。需要评估LLMs在引用归属任务中是否存在人口统计偏见。
AI.method: 引入AttriBench基准数据集，平衡作者名望和人口统计特征（种族、性别等）。使用该数据集评估11个广泛使用的LLMs在不同提示设置下的表现，特别关注抑制现象（模型完全省略归属的情况）。
AI.result: 引用归属对前沿模型仍是挑战任务；观察到种族、性别和交叉群体之间在归属准确性上存在巨大系统性差异；抑制现象普遍存在且在不同人口统计群体中分布不均，揭示了标准准确性指标未能捕捉的系统性偏见。
AI.conclusion: 引用归属可作为评估LLMs代表性公平性的基准，AttriBench数据集为受控研究人口统计偏见提供了工具，揭示了当前LLMs在公平性方面的重要缺陷。

title: Simulating the Evolution of Alignment and Values in Machine Intelligence
summary: Model alignment is currently applied in a vacuum, evaluated primarily through standardised benchmark performance. The purpose of this study is to examine the effects of alignment on populations of models through time. We focus on the treatment of beliefs which contain both an alignment signal (how well it does on the test) and a true value (what the impact actually will be). By applying evolutionary theory we can model how different populations of beliefs and selection methodologies can fix deceptive beliefs through iterative alignment testing. The correlation between testing accuracy and true value remains a strong feature, but even at high correlations ($ρ= 0.8$) there is variability in the resulting deceptive beliefs that become fixed. Mutations allow for more complex developments, highlighting the increasing need to update the quality of tests to avoid fixation of maliciously deceptive models. Only by combining improving evaluator capabilities, adaptive test design, and mutational dynamics do we see significant reductions in deception while maintaining alignment fitness (permutation test, $p_{\text{adj}} < 0.001$).

AI.tldr: 该研究应用进化理论分析模型对齐过程中欺骗性信念的固定现象，发现即使测试准确性与真实价值高度相关，迭代对齐测试仍可能导致欺骗性信念固定，需要结合改进评估能力、自适应测试设计和突变动态来减少欺骗
AI.motivation: 当前模型对齐主要在真空中进行，主要通过标准化基准性能评估。本研究旨在通过时间维度考察对齐对模型群体的影响，特别关注包含对齐信号（测试表现）和真实价值（实际影响）的信念处理，以理解欺骗性信念如何通过迭代对齐测试被固定
AI.method: 应用进化理论建模不同信念群体和选择方法，分析欺骗性信念如何通过迭代对齐测试被固定。研究考察测试准确性与真实价值之间的相关性，分析突变对复杂发展的影响，并评估结合改进评估能力、自适应测试设计和突变动态的综合方法
AI.result: 即使测试准确性与真实价值高度相关（ρ=0.8），结果中欺骗性信念的固定仍存在变异性。突变允许更复杂的发展，突显了需要更新测试质量以避免恶意欺骗模型固定的必要性。只有结合改进评估能力、自适应测试设计和突变动态，才能显著减少欺骗同时保持对齐适应性（置换检验，p_adj < 0.001）
AI.conclusion: 模型对齐过程存在欺骗性信念固定的风险，即使测试表现与实际价值高度相关。为避免恶意欺骗模型的固定，需要综合改进评估能力、采用自适应测试设计并考虑突变动态，这能显著减少欺骗同时保持对齐性能

title: Pressure, What Pressure? Sycophancy Disentanglement in Language Models via Reward Decomposition
summary: Large language models exhibit sycophancy, the tendency to shift their stated positions toward perceived user preferences or authority cues regardless of evidence. Standard alignment methods fail to correct this because scalar reward models conflate two distinct failure modes into a single signal: pressure capitulation, where the model changes a correct answer under social pressure, and evidence blindness, where the model ignores the provided context entirely. We operationalise sycophancy through formal definitions of pressure independence and evidence responsiveness, serving as a working framework for disentangled training rather than a definitive characterisation of the phenomenon. We propose the first approach to sycophancy reduction via reward decomposition, introducing a multi-component Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) reward that decomposes the training signal into five terms: pressure resistance, context fidelity, position consistency, agreement suppression, and factual correctness. We train using a contrastive dataset pairing pressure-free baselines with pressured variants across three authority levels and two opposing evidence contexts. Across five base models, our two-phase pipeline consistently reduces sycophancy on all metric axes, with ablations confirming that each reward term governs an independent behavioural dimension. The learned resistance to pressure generalises beyond our training methodology and prompt structure, reducing answer-priming sycophancy by up to 17 points on SycophancyEval despite the absence of such pressure forms during training.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过奖励分解来减少大语言模型谄媚行为的方法，将训练信号分解为五个独立组件，有效降低了模型在权威压力下改变正确立场的问题。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型存在谄媚行为，即倾向于根据感知到的用户偏好或权威线索改变立场，而不考虑证据。标准的对齐方法无法纠正这一问题，因为标量奖励模型将两种不同的失败模式混为一谈：压力屈服（模型在社会压力下改变正确答案）和证据盲视（模型完全忽略提供的上下文）。
AI.method: 提出了基于奖励分解的谄媚行为减少方法，引入多组件群体相对策略优化（GRPO）奖励，将训练信号分解为五个术语：压力抵抗、上下文保真度、立场一致性、同意抑制和事实正确性。使用对比数据集进行训练，该数据集在三个权威级别和两个对立证据上下文中配对无压力基线和压力变体。
AI.result: 在五个基础模型上，两阶段训练流程在所有度量轴上持续减少谄媚行为。消融实验确认每个奖励术语控制独立的行为维度。学习到的压力抵抗能力能够泛化到训练方法和提示结构之外，在SycophancyEval上将答案引导式谄媚减少了高达17个百分点，尽管训练期间未包含此类压力形式。
AI.conclusion: 通过奖励分解方法可以有效减少大语言模型的谄媚行为，将训练信号分解为独立组件能够更精确地控制模型行为，学习到的压力抵抗能力具有良好的泛化性，为解决模型对齐中的谄媚问题提供了新途径。

title: Graph of Skills: Dependency-Aware Structural Retrieval for Massive Agent Skills
comment: 13 pages of main text, 13 pages of appendix. Core contribution by Dawei Li and Zongxia Li. Project page: https://github.com/davidliuk/graph-of-skills
summary:
Skill usage has become a core component of modern agent systems and can substantially improve agents' ability to complete complex tasks. In real-world settings, where agents must monitor and interact with numerous personal applications, web browsers, and other environment interfaces, skill libraries can scale to thousands of reusable skills. Scaling to larger skill sets introduces two key challenges. First, loading the full skill set saturates the context window, driving up token costs, hallucination, and latency.
  In this paper, we present Graph of Skills (GoS), an inference-time structural retrieval layer for large skill libraries. GoS constructs an executable skill graph offline from skill packages, then at inference time retrieves a bounded, dependency-aware skill bundle through hybrid semantic-lexical seeding, reverse-weighted Personalized PageRank, and context-budgeted hydration. On SkillsBench and ALFWorld, GoS improves average reward by 43.6% over the vanilla full skill-loading baseline while reducing input tokens by 37.8%, and generalizes across three model families: Claude Sonnet, GPT-5.2 Codex, and MiniMax. Additional ablation studies across skill libraries ranging from 200 to 2,000 skills further demonstrate that GoS consistently outperforms both vanilla skills loading and simple vector retrieval in balancing reward, token efficiency, and runtime.

AI.tldr: GoS是一种用于大规模技能库的推理时结构检索层，通过构建可执行技能图，在推理时检索有界、依赖感知的技能包，显著提升奖励并减少输入令牌
AI.motivation: 现实世界中智能体需要监控和交互大量个人应用、网页浏览器等环境接口，技能库可能扩展到数千个可重用技能。大规模技能集带来两个关键挑战：1) 加载完整技能集会饱和上下文窗口，增加令牌成本、幻觉和延迟；2) 需要高效检索相关技能
AI.method: GoS从技能包离线构建可执行技能图，在推理时通过混合语义-词汇种子、反向加权个性化PageRank和上下文预算水合，检索有界、依赖感知的技能包
AI.result: 在SkillsBench和ALFWorld上，GoS相比完整技能加载基线平均奖励提升43.6%，输入令牌减少37.8%，在Claude Sonnet、GPT-5.2 Codex和MiniMax三个模型家族上均能泛化。在200-2000技能库的消融研究中，GoS在奖励、令牌效率和运行时平衡方面持续优于完整技能加载和简单向量检索
AI.conclusion: GoS作为大规模技能库的结构检索层，有效解决了技能库扩展带来的上下文窗口饱和问题，通过依赖感知的图检索机制实现了奖励提升和效率优化的平衡

title: TRACE: Capability-Targeted Agentic Training
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) deployed in agentic environments must exercise multiple capabilities across different task instances, where a capability is performing one or more actions in a trajectory that are necessary for successfully solving a subset of tasks in the environment. Many existing approaches either rely on synthetic training data that is not targeted to the model's actual capability deficits in the target environment or train directly on the target environment, where the model needs to implicitly learn the capabilities across tasks. We introduce TRACE (Turning Recurrent Agent failures into Capability-targeted training Environments), an end-to-end system for environment-specific agent self-improvement. TRACE contrasts successful and failed trajectories to automatically identify lacking capabilities, synthesizes a targeted training environment for each that rewards whether the capability was exercised, and trains a LoRA adapter via RL on each synthetic environment, routing to the relevant adapter at inference. Empirically, TRACE generalizes across different environments, improving over the base agent by +14.1 points on $τ^2$-bench (customer service) and +7 perfect scores on ToolSandbox (tool use), outperforming the strongest baseline by +7.4 points and +4 perfect scores, respectively. Given the same number of rollouts, TRACE scales more efficiently than baselines, outperforming GRPO and GEPA by +9.2 and +7.4 points on $τ^2$-bench.

AI.tldr: TRACE是一个端到端系统，通过分析智能体成功与失败轨迹自动识别能力缺陷，为每个缺陷合成针对性训练环境，并通过强化学习训练LoRA适配器，实现环境特定的智能体自我改进。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖非针对性的合成训练数据，要么直接在目标环境中训练，需要智能体隐式学习跨任务能力。需要一种能自动识别智能体在特定环境中能力缺陷并进行针对性改进的系统。
AI.method: TRACE对比成功与失败轨迹自动识别能力缺陷，为每个缺陷合成针对性训练环境（奖励是否运用该能力），通过强化学习在每个合成环境中训练LoRA适配器，推理时路由到相关适配器。
AI.result: 在τ²-bench（客户服务）上比基础智能体提升14.1分，在ToolSandbox（工具使用）上多获得7个完美分数；比最强基线分别提升7.4分和4个完美分数。在相同rollout次数下，比GRPO和GEPA分别提升9.2分和7.4分。
AI.conclusion: TRACE能有效识别智能体能力缺陷并进行针对性训练，在不同环境中具有良好泛化能力，比现有方法更高效地提升智能体性能。

title: Dynamic Agentic AI Expert Profiler System Architecture for Multidomain Intelligence Modeling
comment: Accepted to be Published in IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI) 2026 - May 8-10, 2026, Granada, Spain
summary: In today's artificial intelligence driven world, modern systems communicate with people from diverse backgrounds and skill levels. For human-machine interaction to be meaningful, systems must be aware of context and user expertise. This study proposes an agentic AI profiler that classifies natural language responses into four levels: Novice, Basic, Advanced, and Expert. The system uses a modular layered architecture built on LLaMA v3.1 (8B), with components for text preprocessing, scoring, aggregation, and classification. Evaluation was conducted in two phases: a static phase using pre-recorded transcripts from 82 participants, and a dynamic phase with 402 live interviews conducted by an agentic AI interviewer. In both phases, participant self-ratings were compared with profiler predictions. In the dynamic phase, expertise was assessed after each response rather than at the end of the interview. Across domains, 83% to 97% of profiler evaluations matched participant self-assessments. Remaining differences were due to self-rating bias, unclear responses, and occasional misinterpretation of nuanced expertise by the language model.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于LLaMA v3.1(8B)的模块化AI分析器，用于将自然语言回答分类为新手、基础、高级和专家四个专业水平等级，在静态和动态评估中与参与者自评的匹配率达到83%-97%。
AI.motivation: 在人工智能驱动的现代系统中，为了确保人机交互的有效性，系统需要能够理解上下文并识别用户的专业水平。当前系统缺乏对用户专业能力的准确评估机制，这限制了交互的个性化和有效性。
AI.method: 采用基于LLaMA v3.1(8B)的模块化分层架构，包含文本预处理、评分、聚合和分类组件。评估分为两个阶段：静态阶段使用82名参与者的预录音文本，动态阶段通过AI面试官对402名参与者进行实时访谈，并在每个回答后评估专业水平。
AI.result: 在不同领域中，分析器评估与参与者自评的匹配率达到83%至97%。剩余差异主要源于自评偏差、回答表述不清以及语言模型偶尔对细微专业知识的误解。
AI.conclusion: 该AI分析器能够有效评估用户的专业水平，为人机交互的个性化和适应性提供了可靠工具。虽然存在少量误差，但整体性能优异，展示了基于大语言模型的用户专业水平分类系统的可行性。

title: ETR: Entropy Trend Reward for Efficient Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves large language model performance on complex tasks, but often produces excessively long and inefficient reasoning traces. Existing methods shorten CoTs using length penalties or global entropy reduction, implicitly assuming that low uncertainty is desirable throughout reasoning. We show instead that reasoning efficiency is governed by the trajectory of uncertainty. CoTs with dominant downward entropy trends are substantially shorter. Motivated by this insight, we propose Entropy Trend Reward (ETR), a trajectory-aware objective that encourages progressive uncertainty reduction while allowing limited local exploration. We integrate ETR into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and evaluate it across multiple reasoning models and challenging benchmarks. ETR consistently achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency tradeoff, improving DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B by 9.9% in accuracy while reducing CoT length by 67% across four benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/Xuan1030/ETR

AI.tldr: 提出ETR方法，通过鼓励推理过程中熵的下降趋势来优化CoT推理效率，在保持准确率的同时大幅缩短推理长度
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过长度惩罚或全局熵减来缩短CoT推理链，隐含假设低不确定性在整个推理过程中都是可取的。但作者发现推理效率实际上由不确定性轨迹决定，具有主导下降熵趋势的CoT推理链更短
AI.method: 提出熵趋势奖励（ETR），这是一种轨迹感知目标，鼓励渐进式不确定性减少，同时允许有限的局部探索。将ETR集成到组相对策略优化（GRPO）中，并在多个推理模型和挑战性基准上进行评估
AI.result: ETR在准确率-效率权衡方面始终表现优异，在四个基准测试中将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B的准确率提高了9.9%，同时将CoT长度减少了67%
AI.conclusion: 推理效率由不确定性轨迹决定而非全局低不确定性，ETR方法通过鼓励熵的下降趋势有效优化了CoT推理的准确率-效率权衡

title: LatentAudit: Real-Time White-Box Faithfulness Monitoring for Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Verifiable Deployment
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mitigates hallucination but does not eliminate it: a deployed system must still decide, at inference time, whether its answer is actually supported by the retrieved evidence. We introduce LatentAudit, a white-box auditor that pools mid-to-late residual-stream activations from an open-weight generator and measures their Mahalanobis distance to the evidence representation. The resulting quadratic rule requires no auxiliary judge model, runs at generation time, and is simple enough to calibrate on a small held-out set. We show that residual-stream geometry carries a usable faithfulness signal, that this signal survives architecture changes and realistic retrieval failures, and that the same rule remains amenable to public verification. On PubMedQA with Llama-3-8B, LatentAudit reaches 0.942 AUROC with 0.77,ms overhead. Across three QA benchmarks and five model families (Llama-2/3, Qwen-2.5/3, Mistral), the monitor remains stable; under a four-way stress test with contradictions, retrieval misses, and partial-support noise, it reaches 0.9566--0.9815 AUROC on PubMedQA and 0.9142--0.9315 on HotpotQA. At 16-bit fixed-point precision, the audit rule preserves 99.8% of the FP16 AUROC, enabling Groth16-based public verification without revealing model weights or activations. Together, these results position residual-stream geometry as a practical basis for real-time RAG faithfulness monitoring and optional verifiable deployment.

AI.tldr: LatentAudit：基于残差流几何的白盒RAG忠实度监控器，通过测量生成器激活与证据表示的Mahalanobis距离实现实时检测，无需额外判断模型，支持公开验证。
AI.motivation: RAG虽能缓解幻觉但无法完全消除，部署系统仍需在推理时判断答案是否真正得到检索证据支持。现有方法通常依赖额外的判断模型，增加了复杂性和计算开销。
AI.method: 提出LatentAudit白盒审计器，从开放权重的生成器中收集中后期残差流激活，测量其与证据表示的Mahalanobis距离。该二次规则无需辅助判断模型，可在生成时运行，且易于在小规模验证集上校准。
AI.result: 在PubMedQA上使用Llama-3-8B达到0.942 AUROC，仅0.77ms开销。跨三个QA基准和五个模型家族保持稳定；在包含矛盾、检索缺失和部分支持噪声的四向压力测试中，PubMedQA达到0.9566-0.9815 AUROC，HotpotQA达到0.9142-0.9315 AUROC。16位定点精度下保持99.8%的FP16 AUROC性能。
AI.conclusion: 残差流几何携带可用的忠实度信号，该信号能经受架构变化和现实检索失败，且同一规则支持公开验证。这为实时RAG忠实度监控和可选的可验证部署提供了实用基础。

title: TFRBench: A Reasoning Benchmark for Evaluating Forecasting Systems
summary: We introduce TFRBench, the first benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning capabilities of forecasting systems. Traditionally, time-series forecasting has been evaluated solely on numerical accuracy, treating foundation models as ``black boxes.'' Unlike existing benchmarks, TFRBench provides a protocol for evaluating the reasoning generated by forecasting systems--specifically their analysis of cross-channel dependencies, trends, and external events. To enable this, we propose a systematic multi-agent framework that utilizes an iterative verification loop to synthesize numerically grounded reasoning traces. Spanning ten datasets across five domains, our evaluation confirms that this reasoning is causally effective; useful for evaluation; and prompting LLMs with our generated traces significantly improves forecasting accuracy compared to direct numerical prediction (e.g., avg. $\sim40.2\%\to56.6\%)$, validating the quality of our reasoning. Conversely, benchmarking experiments reveal that off-the-shelf LLMs consistently struggle with both reasoning (lower LLM-as-a-Judge scores) and numerical forecasting, frequently failing to capture domain-specific dynamics. TFRBench thus establishes a new standard for interpretable, reasoning-based evaluation in time-series forecasting. Our benchmark is available at: https://tfrbench.github.io

AI.tldr: TFRBench是首个评估预测系统推理能力的基准，通过多智能体框架生成数值基础的推理轨迹，显著提升预测准确性，揭示现成LLM在推理和数值预测方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列预测仅评估数值准确性，将基础模型视为"黑箱"，缺乏对预测系统推理能力的评估。需要建立能够评估跨通道依赖、趋势和外部事件分析的基准。
AI.method: 提出系统化的多智能体框架，利用迭代验证循环合成数值基础的推理轨迹。在五个领域的十个数据集上进行评估，通过LLM-as-a-Judge评分和数值准确性对比分析。
AI.result: 生成的推理轨迹具有因果有效性，对评估有用；使用这些轨迹提示LLM可将预测准确率从平均40.2%提升至56.6%。现成LLM在推理和数值预测方面表现不佳，难以捕捉领域特定动态。
AI.conclusion: TFRBench为时间序列预测建立了可解释、基于推理的评估新标准，填补了传统纯数值评估的空白，为预测系统的推理能力提供了系统化评估框架。

title: LLM-as-Judge for Semantic Judging of Powerline Segmentation in UAV Inspection
summary: The deployment of lightweight segmentation models on drones for autonomous power line inspection presents a critical challenge: maintaining reliable performance under real-world conditions that differ from training data. Although compact architectures such as U-Net enable real-time onboard inference, their segmentation outputs can degrade unpredictably in adverse environments, raising safety concerns. In this work, we study the feasibility of using a large language model (LLM) as a semantic judge to assess the reliability of power line segmentation results produced by drone-mounted models. Rather than introducing a new inspection system, we formalize a watchdog scenario in which an offboard LLM evaluates segmentation overlays and examine whether such a judge can be trusted to behave consistently and perceptually coherently. To this end, we design two evaluation protocols that analyze the judge's repeatability and sensitivity. First, we assess repeatability by repeatedly querying the LLM with identical inputs and fixed prompts, measuring the stability of its quality scores and confidence estimates. Second, we evaluate perceptual sensitivity by introducing controlled visual corruptions (fog, rain, snow, shadow, and sunflare) and analyzing how the judge's outputs respond to progressive degradation in segmentation quality. Our results show that the LLM produces highly consistent categorical judgments under identical conditions while exhibiting appropriate declines in confidence as visual reliability deteriorates. Moreover, the judge remains responsive to perceptual cues such as missing or misidentified power lines, even under challenging conditions. These findings suggest that, when carefully constrained, an LLM can serve as a reliable semantic judge for monitoring segmentation quality in safety-critical aerial inspection tasks.

AI.tldr: 使用大型语言模型作为语义裁判评估无人机电力线分割结果的可靠性，通过重复性和感知敏感性测试验证其作为监控分割质量的可信度。
AI.motivation: 无人机自主电力线巡检中，轻量级分割模型在真实环境下的性能可能不可靠，存在安全隐患。需要一种方法来评估分割结果的可靠性，确保安全关键任务的可信度。
AI.method: 提出"看门狗"场景，使用离板LLM评估分割叠加结果。设计两种评估协议：1)重复性测试：固定输入和提示下重复查询LLM，测量质量分数和置信度估计的稳定性；2)感知敏感性测试：引入受控视觉干扰（雾、雨、雪、阴影、阳光眩光），分析LLM输出对分割质量逐步退化的响应。
AI.result: LLM在相同条件下产生高度一致的分类判断，同时随着视觉可靠性下降，置信度适当降低。即使在挑战性条件下，裁判仍能响应感知线索（如缺失或误识别的电力线）。
AI.conclusion: 当受到适当约束时，LLM可以作为可靠的语义裁判，用于监控安全关键空中巡检任务中的分割质量。

title: Towards Effective In-context Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer via Domain-invariant-neurons-based Retrieval
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have made notable progress in logical reasoning, yet still fall short of human-level performance. Current boosting strategies rely on expert-crafted in-domain demonstrations, limiting their applicability in expertise-scarce domains, such as specialized mathematical reasoning, formal logic, or legal analysis. In this work, we demonstrate the feasibility of leveraging cross-domain demonstrating examples to boost the LLMs' reasoning performance. Despite substantial domain differences, many reusable implicit logical structures are shared across domains. In order to effectively retrieve cross-domain examples for unseen domains under investigation, in this work, we further propose an effective retrieval method, called domain-invariant neurons-based retrieval (\textbf{DIN-Retrieval}). Concisely, DIN-Retrieval first summarizes a hidden representation that is universal across different domains. Then, during the inference stage, we use the DIN vector to retrieve structurally compatible cross-domain demonstrations for the in-context learning. Experimental results in multiple settings for the transfer of mathematical and logical reasoning demonstrate that our method achieves an average improvement of 1.8 over the state-of-the-art methods \footnote{Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Leon221220/DIN-Retrieval}.

AI.tldr: 提出DIN-Retrieval方法，通过提取跨领域不变神经元表征，从不同领域检索结构兼容的演示示例来提升LLM推理性能
AI.motivation: 当前LLM逻辑推理提升策略依赖专家构建的领域内演示示例，限制了在专业数学推理、形式逻辑、法律分析等专家稀缺领域的应用。需要探索利用跨领域演示示例来提升LLM推理性能的可能性。
AI.method: 提出DIN-Retrieval方法：1) 总结跨领域通用的隐藏表征（领域不变神经元）；2) 在推理阶段使用DIN向量检索结构兼容的跨领域演示示例用于上下文学习
AI.result: 在数学和逻辑推理的多种迁移设置中，该方法相比最先进方法平均提升1.8个点
AI.conclusion: 证明了利用跨领域演示示例提升LLM推理性能的可行性，提出的DIN-Retrieval方法能有效检索结构兼容的跨领域示例，显著提升推理性能

title: Neural Assistive Impulses: Synthesizing Exaggerated Motions for Physics-based Characters
summary: Physics-based character animation has become a fundamental approach for synthesizing realistic, physically plausible motions. While current data-driven deep reinforcement learning (DRL) methods can synthesize complex skills, they struggle to reproduce exaggerated, stylized motions, such as instantaneous dashes or mid-air trajectory changes, which are required in animation but violate standard physical laws. The primary limitation stems from modeling the character as an underactuated floating-base system, in which internal joint torques and momentum conservation strictly govern motion. Direct attempts to enforce such motions via external wrenches often lead to training instability, as velocity discontinuities produce sparse, high-magnitude force spikes that prevent policy convergence. We propose Assistive Impulse Neural Control, a framework that reformulates external assistance in impulse space rather than force space to ensure numerical stability. We decompose the assistive signal into an analytic high-frequency component derived from Inverse Dynamics and a learned low-frequency residual correction, governed by a hybrid neural policy. We demonstrate that our method enables robust tracking of highly agile, dynamically infeasible maneuvers that were previously intractable for physics-based methods.

AI.tldr: 提出Assistive Impulse Neural Control框架，通过脉冲空间而非力空间重新定义外部辅助，实现物理角色动画中夸张、风格化动作的稳定合成
AI.motivation: 当前基于数据驱动的深度强化学习方法虽然能合成复杂技能，但难以再现违反标准物理定律的夸张风格化动作（如瞬时冲刺、空中轨迹变化）。主要限制源于将角色建模为欠驱动浮基系统，内部关节扭矩和动量守恒严格约束运动。直接通过外部力矩强制此类动作会导致训练不稳定，速度不连续性产生稀疏、高幅度的力尖峰，阻碍策略收敛。
AI.method: 提出Assistive Impulse Neural Control框架：1）在脉冲空间而非力空间重新定义外部辅助，确保数值稳定性；2）将辅助信号分解为基于逆动力学导出的解析高频分量和学习的低频残差校正；3）采用混合神经策略进行控制。
AI.result: 该方法能够稳健地跟踪高度敏捷、动态不可行的机动动作，这些动作先前对于基于物理的方法是无法处理的。实现了对夸张风格化动作的稳定合成。
AI.conclusion: 通过将外部辅助重新定义为脉冲空间而非力空间，并结合解析高频分量与学习低频残差的混合方法，成功解决了物理角色动画中合成违反物理定律的夸张风格化动作的难题，实现了数值稳定的训练和高质量动作生成。

title: Reason Analogically via Cross-domain Prior Knowledge: An Empirical Study of Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer for In-Context Learning
summary: Despite its success, existing in-context learning (ICL) relies on in-domain expert demonstrations, limiting its applicability when expert annotations are scarce. We posit that different domains may share underlying reasoning structures, enabling source-domain demonstrations to improve target-domain inference despite semantic mismatch. To test this hypothesis, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study of different retrieval methods to validate the feasibility of achieving cross-domain knowledge transfer under the in-context learning setting. Our results demonstrate conditional positive transfer in cross-domain ICL. We identify a clear example absorption threshold: beyond it, positive transfer becomes more likely, and additional demonstrations yield larger gains. Further analysis suggests that these gains stem from reasoning structure repair by retrieved cross-domain examples, rather than semantic cues. Overall, our study validates the feasibility of leveraging cross-domain knowledge transfer to improve cross-domain ICL performance, motivating the community to explore designing more effective retrieval approaches for this novel direction.\footnote{Our implementation is available at https://github.com/littlelaska/ICL-TF4LR}

AI.tldr: 该研究验证了跨领域上下文学习（ICL）的可行性，发现当使用足够多的源领域示例时，即使存在语义不匹配，也能实现正向知识迁移，这主要源于推理结构的修复而非语义线索。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文学习依赖于同领域专家标注的演示示例，这在专家标注稀缺时限制了其应用。研究者假设不同领域可能共享底层推理结构，使得源领域演示能够改善目标领域推理，尽管存在语义不匹配。
AI.method: 通过全面的实证研究，采用不同的检索方法来验证跨领域知识转移在上下文学习设置下的可行性。重点分析了不同检索方法的效果，并识别了示例吸收阈值。
AI.result: 研究证实了跨领域ICL中存在条件性正向转移。发现了一个清晰的示例吸收阈值：超过该阈值后，正向转移更可能发生，且额外演示能带来更大收益。分析表明这些收益源于检索到的跨领域示例对推理结构的修复，而非语义线索。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了利用跨领域知识转移改善跨领域ICL性能的可行性，激励社区探索设计更有效的检索方法以推动这一新方向的发展。

title: Multi-Agent Pathfinding with Non-Unit Integer Edge Costs via Enhanced Conflict-Based Search and Graph Discretization
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, submitted to cs.AI, Multi-Agent Systems, Pathfinding Optimization
summary: Multi-Agent Pathfinding (MAPF) plays a critical role in various domains. Traditional MAPF methods typically assume unit edge costs and single-timestep actions, which limit their applicability to real-world scenarios. MAPFR extends MAPF to handle non-unit costs with real-valued edge costs and continuous-time actions, but its geometric collision model leads to an unbounded state space that compromises solver efficiency. In this paper, we propose MAPFZ, a novel MAPF variant on graphs with non-unit integer costs that preserves a finite state space while offering improved realism over classical MAPF. To solve MAPFZ efficiently, we develop CBS-NIC, an enhanced Conflict-Based Search framework incorporating time-interval-based conflict detection and an improved Safe Interval Path Planning (SIPP) algorithm. Additionally, we propose Bayesian Optimization for Graph Design (BOGD), a discretization method for non-unit edge costs that balances efficiency and accuracy with a sub-linear regret bound. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in runtime and success rate across diverse benchmark scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出MAPFZ新变体处理非单位整数成本，开发CBS-NIC求解框架和BOGD图设计方法，在运行时间和成功率上优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 传统MAPF假设单位边成本和单时间步动作，限制了实际应用；MAPFR扩展了非单位成本但几何碰撞模型导致无限状态空间，影响求解效率
AI.method: 提出MAPFZ变体处理非单位整数成本，保持有限状态空间；开发CBS-NIC框架（基于时间间隔的冲突检测和改进的SIPP算法）；提出BOGD离散化方法平衡效率和精度
AI.result: 在多种基准场景下，该方法在运行时间和成功率方面优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: MAPFZ在保持有限状态空间的同时提高了现实性，CBS-NIC和BOGD为高效求解非单位成本MAPF问题提供了有效解决方案

title: Automated Auditing of Hospital Discharge Summaries for Care Transitions
comment: Accepted as a poster at IEEE-ICHI 2026; 3 pages, 2 figure
summary: Incomplete or inconsistent discharge documentation is a primary driver of care fragmentation and avoidable readmissions. Despite its critical role in patient safety, auditing discharge summaries relies heavily on manual review and is difficult to scale. We propose an automated framework for large-scale auditing of discharge summaries using locally deployed Large Language Models (LLMs). Our approach operationalizes core transition-of-care requirements such as follow-up instructions, medication history and changes, patient information and clinical course, etc. into a structured validation checklist of questions based on DISCHARGED framework. Using adult inpatient summaries from the MIMIC-IV database, we utilize a privacy-preserving LLM to identify the presence, absence, or ambiguity of key documentation elements. This work demonstrates the feasibility of scalable, automated clinical auditing and provides a foundation for systematic quality improvement in electronic health record documentation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于本地部署大语言模型的自动化出院小结审核框架，用于大规模临床文档质量评估
AI.motivation: 出院文档不完整或不一致是导致医疗碎片化和可避免再入院的主要原因，目前依赖人工审核难以规模化
AI.method: 基于DISCHARGED框架将核心过渡期护理要求转化为结构化验证检查清单，使用本地部署的隐私保护LLM识别MIMIC-IV数据库中成人住院患者出院小结的关键文档元素存在、缺失或模糊情况
AI.result: 证明了可扩展的自动化临床审核的可行性，为电子健康记录文档的系统性质量改进奠定了基础
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够实现大规模、自动化的出院小结审核，有助于提高临床文档质量和患者安全

title: Adaptive Serverless Resource Management via Slot-Survival Prediction and Event-Driven Lifecycle Control
summary: Serverless computing eliminates infrastructure management overhead but introduces significant challenges regarding cold start latency and resource utilization. Traditional static resource allocation often leads to inefficiencies under variable workloads, resulting in performance degradation or excessive costs. This paper presents an adaptive engineering framework that optimizes serverless performance through event-driven architecture and probabilistic modeling. We propose a dual-strategy mechanism that dynamically adjusts idle durations and employs an intelligent request waiting strategy based on slot survival predictions. By leveraging sliding window aggregation and asynchronous processing, our system proactively manages resource lifecycles. Experimental results show that our approach reduces cold starts by up to 51.2% and improves cost-efficiency by nearly 2x compared to baseline methods in multi-cloud environments.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应工程框架优化无服务器性能，通过事件驱动架构和概率建模，采用双策略机制动态调整空闲时长和智能请求等待，减少冷启动51.2%，成本效率提升近2倍
AI.motivation: 无服务器计算消除了基础设施管理开销，但面临冷启动延迟和资源利用率的重大挑战。传统静态资源分配在可变工作负载下效率低下，导致性能下降或成本过高。
AI.method: 提出自适应工程框架，采用事件驱动架构和概率建模。设计双策略机制：1) 动态调整空闲时长；2) 基于槽位生存预测的智能请求等待策略。利用滑动窗口聚合和异步处理主动管理资源生命周期。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在多云环境中相比基线方法减少冷启动达51.2%，成本效率提升近2倍。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应框架有效解决了无服务器计算中的冷启动和资源利用率问题，通过动态资源管理和智能调度策略显著提升了性能和成本效率。

title: OntoTKGE: Ontology-Enhanced Temporal Knowledge Graph Extrapolation
summary: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) extrapolation is an important task that aims to predict future facts through historical interaction information within KG snapshots. A key challenge for most existing TKG extrapolation models is handling entities with sparse historical interaction. The ontological knowledge is beneficial for alleviating this sparsity issue by enabling these entities to inherit behavioral patterns from other entities with the same concept, which is ignored by previous studies. In this paper, we propose a novel encoder-decoder framework OntoTKGE that leverages the ontological knowledge from the ontology-view KG (i.e., a KG modeling hierarchical relations among abstract concepts as well as the connections between concepts and entities) to guide the TKG extrapolation model's learning process through the effective integration of the ontological and temporal knowledge, thereby enhancing entity embeddings. OntoTKGE is flexible enough to adapt to many TKG extrapolation models. Extensive experiments on four data sets demonstrate that OntoTKGE not only significantly improves the performance of many TKG extrapolation models but also surpasses many SOTA baseline methods.

AI.tldr: OntoTKGE：利用本体知识增强时序知识图谱外推的编码器-解码器框架，通过整合本体和时序知识改善稀疏实体预测
AI.motivation: 现有时序知识图谱外推模型难以处理历史交互稀疏的实体，而本体知识能让这些实体从相同概念的其他实体继承行为模式，这一优势被先前研究忽略
AI.method: 提出OntoTKGE编码器-解码器框架，利用本体视图知识图谱（建模抽象概念间层次关系及概念与实体连接）的本体知识，通过有效整合本体和时序知识来指导学习过程，增强实体嵌入表示
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的大量实验表明，OntoTKGE不仅显著提升多个时序知识图谱外推模型的性能，还超越了许多最先进的基线方法
AI.conclusion: OntoTKGE框架通过整合本体知识有效缓解了时序知识图谱外推中的实体稀疏性问题，具有良好适应性并能显著提升预测性能

title: Can We Trust a Black-box LLM? LLM Untrustworthy Boundary Detection via Bias-Diffusion and Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown a high capability in answering questions on a diverse range of topics. However, these models sometimes produce biased, ideologized or incorrect responses, limiting their applications if there is no clear understanding of which topics their answers can be trusted. In this research, we introduce a novel algorithm, named as GMRL-BD, designed to identify the untrustworthy boundaries (in terms of topics) of a given LLM, with black-box access to the LLM and under specific query constraints. Based on a general Knowledge Graph (KG) derived from Wikipedia, our algorithm incorporates with multiple reinforcement learning agents to efficiently identify topics (some nodes in KG) where the LLM is likely to generate biased answers. Our experiments demonstrated the efficiency of our algorithm, which can detect the untrustworthy boundary with just limited queries to the LLM. Additionally, we have released a new dataset containing popular LLMs including Llama2, Vicuna, Falcon, Qwen2, Gemma2 and Yi-1.5, along with labels indicating the topics on which each LLM is likely to be biased.

AI.tldr: 提出GMRL-BD算法，通过知识图谱和多智能体强化学习识别大语言模型的可信边界，检测模型可能产生偏见回答的主题领域
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在多样主题上表现出色，但有时会产生偏见、意识形态化或不正确的回答，限制了其应用。目前缺乏明确的方法来确定模型在哪些主题上的回答是可信的。
AI.method: 提出GMRL-BD算法：1) 基于维基百科构建通用知识图谱；2) 结合多智能体强化学习高效识别知识图谱中LLM可能产生偏见回答的主题节点；3) 在仅黑盒访问LLM和特定查询约束下工作。
AI.result: 实验证明算法高效，仅需有限查询即可检测LLM的不可信边界。发布了包含Llama2、Vicuna、Falcon、Qwen2、Gemma2和Yi-1.5等流行LLM的新数据集，标注了每个模型可能产生偏见的主题。
AI.conclusion: GMRL-BD算法能够有效识别LLM的可信边界，为理解模型局限性提供工具，有助于更安全地部署LLM。发布的数据集为后续研究提供了基准。

title: Auditable Agents
summary:
LLM agents call tools, query databases, delegate tasks, and trigger external side effects. Once an agent system can act in the world, the question is no longer only whether harmful actions can be prevented--it is whether those actions remain answerable after deployment. We distinguish accountability (the ability to determine compliance and assign responsibility), auditability (the system property that makes accountability possible), and auditing (the process of reconstructing behavior from trustworthy evidence). Our claim is direct: no agent system can be accountable without auditability.
  To make this operational, we define five dimensions of agent auditability, i.e., action recoverability, lifecycle coverage, policy checkability, responsibility attribution, and evidence integrity, and identify three mechanism classes (detect, enforce, recover) whose temporal information-and-intervention constraints explain why, in practice, no single approach suffices. We support the position with layered evidence rather than a single benchmark: lower-bound ecosystem measurements suggest that even basic security prerequisites for auditability are widely unmet (617 security findings across six prominent open-source projects); runtime feasibility results show that pre-execution mediation with tamper-evident records adds only 8.3 ms median overhead; and controlled recovery experiments show that responsibility-relevant information can be partially recovered even when conventional logs are missing. We propose an Auditability Card for agent systems and identify six open research problems organized by mechanism class.

AI.tldr: 论文提出智能体系统的可审计性概念，区分问责制、可审计性和审计过程，定义五个可审计性维度，并通过实证研究证明当前系统在可审计性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体系统能够执行工具调用、数据库查询、任务委派和触发外部副作用，问题从仅防止有害行动转变为部署后这些行动是否仍可被问责。论文主张没有可审计性就没有问责制。
AI.method: 定义智能体可审计性的五个维度（行动可恢复性、生命周期覆盖、策略可检查性、责任归属、证据完整性），识别三类机制（检测、执行、恢复），通过生态系统测量、运行时可行性测试和受控恢复实验提供分层证据。
AI.result: 生态系统测量显示617个安全发现表明基本安全前提广泛未满足；运行时测试显示预执行调解与防篡改记录仅增加8.3毫秒中位开销；恢复实验表明即使传统日志缺失，责任相关信息仍可部分恢复。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出智能体系统审计卡概念，并按机制类别识别六个开放研究问题。核心结论是：没有可审计性就没有问责制，需要多机制组合方法确保智能体系统的可审计性。

title: SCMAPR: Self-Correcting Multi-Agent Prompt Refinement for Complex-Scenario Text-to-Video Generation
summary: Text-to-Video (T2V) generation has benefited from recent advances in diffusion models, yet current systems still struggle under complex scenarios, which are generally exacerbated by the ambiguity and underspecification of text prompts. In this work, we formulate complex-scenario prompt refinement as a stage-wise multi-agent refinement process and propose SCMAPR, i.e., a scenario-aware and Self-Correcting Multi-Agent Prompt Refinement framework for T2V prompting. SCMAPR coordinates specialized agents to (i) route each prompt to a taxonomy-grounded scenario for strategy selection, (ii) synthesize scenario-aware rewriting policies and perform policy-conditioned refinement, and (iii) conduct structured semantic verification that triggers conditional revision when violations are detected. To clarify what constitutes complex scenarios in T2V prompting, provide representative examples, and enable rigorous evaluation under such challenging conditions, we further introduce {T2V-Complexity}, which is a complex-scenario T2V benchmark consisting exclusively of complex-scenario prompts. Extensive experiments on 3 existing benchmarks and our T2V-Complexity benchmark demonstrate that SCMAPR consistently improves text-video alignment and overall generation quality under complex scenarios, achieving up to 2.67\% and 3.28 gains in average score on VBench and EvalCrafter, and up to 0.028 improvement on T2V-CompBench over 3 State-Of-The-Art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出SCMAPR框架，通过多智能体协作对复杂场景文本提示进行细化，提升文本到视频生成质量
AI.motivation: 当前文本到视频生成系统在处理复杂场景时面临挑战，主要由于文本提示的模糊性和不完整性，需要更有效的提示细化方法
AI.method: SCMAPR框架采用阶段式多智能体细化流程：1) 基于分类的路由策略选择；2) 场景感知的改写策略合成与细化；3) 结构化语义验证与条件性修订
AI.result: 在3个现有基准和新提出的T2V-Complexity基准上，SCMAPR显著提升了文本-视频对齐和生成质量，在VBench、EvalCrafter和T2V-CompBench上分别获得2.67%、3.28%和0.028的改进
AI.conclusion: SCMAPR通过多智能体协作的提示细化框架有效解决了复杂场景下文本到视频生成的挑战，为处理模糊和欠规范的文本提示提供了系统化解决方案

title: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives to autoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodal tasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models (dMLLMs). These models are expected to retain the reasoning capabilities of LLMs while enabling faster inference through parallel generation. However, when combined with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, dMLLMs exhibit two critical issues. First, we observe that dMLLMs often generate the final answer token at a very early timestep. This trend indicates that the model determines the answer before sufficient reasoning, leading to degraded reasoning performance. Second, during the initial timesteps, dMLLMs show minimal dependency on visual prompts, exhibiting a fundamentally different pattern of visual information utilization compared to AR vision-language models. In summary, these findings indicate that dMLLMs tend to generate premature final answers without sufficiently grounding on visual inputs. To address these limitations, we propose Position and Step Penalty (PSP) and Visual Reasoning Guidance (VRG). PSP penalizes tokens in later positions during early timesteps, delaying premature answer generation and encouraging progressive reasoning across timesteps. VRG, inspired by classifier-free guidance, amplifies visual grounding signals to enhance the model's alignment with visual evidence. Extensive experiments across various dMLLMs demonstrate that our method achieves up to 7.5% higher accuracy while delivering more than 3x speedup compared to reasoning with four times more diffusion steps.

AI.tldr: 本文针对扩散多模态大语言模型(dMLLMs)在结合思维链推理时出现的两个关键问题：过早生成最终答案和视觉信息利用不足，提出了位置与步长惩罚(PSP)和视觉推理引导(VRG)两种方法，显著提升了推理性能并加速了推理过程。
AI.motivation: 扩散多模态大语言模型(dMLLMs)作为自回归模型的有前景替代方案，在结合思维链推理时存在两个关键问题：1）模型在推理早期就生成最终答案，导致推理不充分；2）在初始时间步中，模型对视觉提示的依赖度极低，视觉信息利用模式与自回归视觉语言模型存在根本差异。这些问题导致dMLLMs倾向于在未充分基于视觉输入的情况下生成过早的最终答案。
AI.method: 提出了两种方法：1）位置与步长惩罚(PSP)：在早期时间步中对后续位置的token施加惩罚，延迟过早的答案生成，鼓励跨时间步的渐进式推理；2）视觉推理引导(VRG)：受无分类器引导的启发，增强视觉基础信号，提升模型与视觉证据的对齐程度。
AI.result: 在多种dMLLMs上的广泛实验表明，该方法实现了高达7.5%的准确率提升，同时相比使用四倍扩散步长的推理，提供了超过3倍的加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PSP和VRG方法有效解决了dMLLMs在思维链推理中的过早答案生成和视觉信息利用不足问题，显著提升了模型的推理性能和效率，为扩散多模态大语言模型的优化提供了有效解决方案。

title: OmniDiagram: Advancing Unified Diagram Code Generation via Visual Interrogation Reward
summary: The paradigm of programmable diagram generation is evolving rapidly, playing a crucial role in structured visualization. However, most existing studies are confined to a narrow range of task formulations and language support, constraining their applicability to diverse diagram types. In this work, we propose OmniDiagram, a unified framework that incorporates diverse diagram code languages and task definitions. To address the challenge of aligning code logic with visual fidelity in Reinforcement Learning (RL), we introduce a novel visual feedback strategy named Visual Interrogation Verifies All (\textsc{Viva}). Unlike brittle syntax-based rules or pixel-level matching, \textsc{Viva} rewards the visual structure of rendered diagrams through a generative approach. Specifically, \textsc{Viva} actively generates targeted visual inquiries to scrutinize diagram visual fidelity and provides fine-grained feedback for optimization. This mechanism facilitates a self-evolving training process, effectively obviating the need for manually annotated ground truth code. Furthermore, we construct M3$^2$Diagram, the first large-scale diagram code generation dataset, containing over 196k high-quality instances. Experimental results confirm that the combination of SFT and our \textsc{Viva}-based RL allows OmniDiagram to establish a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) across diagram code generation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: OmniDiagram是一个统一的图表代码生成框架，通过创新的视觉反馈策略Viva和首个大规模图表代码数据集M3²Diagram，在图表代码生成任务上实现了新的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可编程图表生成研究局限于狭窄的任务定义和语言支持范围，限制了其在不同图表类型上的适用性。需要建立一个能够整合多种图表代码语言和任务定义的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出OmniDiagram统一框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 整合多种图表代码语言和任务定义；2) 引入创新的视觉反馈策略Viva，通过生成有针对性的视觉查询来审查图表视觉保真度，提供细粒度反馈；3) 构建首个大规模图表代码生成数据集M3²Diagram，包含超过196k高质量实例。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，结合监督微调(SFT)和基于Viva的强化学习，OmniDiagram在图表代码生成基准测试中建立了新的最先进(SOTA)性能。
AI.conclusion: OmniDiagram通过统一的框架设计、创新的视觉反馈机制Viva和大规模数据集M3²Diagram，解决了现有图表代码生成方法的局限性，实现了更广泛的应用覆盖和更高的生成质量。

title: UniCreative: Unifying Long-form Logic and Short-form Sparkle via Reference-Free Reinforcement Learning
summary: A fundamental challenge in creative writing lies in reconciling the inherent tension between maintaining global coherence in long-form narratives and preserving local expressiveness in short-form texts. While long-context generation necessitates explicit macroscopic planning, short-form creativity often demands spontaneous, constraint-free expression. Existing alignment paradigms, however, typically employ static reward signals and rely heavily on high-quality supervised data, which is costly and difficult to scale. To address this, we propose \textbf{UniCreative}, a unified reference-free reinforcement learning framework. We first introduce \textbf{AC-GenRM}, an adaptive constraint-aware reward model that dynamically synthesizes query-specific criteria to provide fine-grained preference judgments. Leveraging these signals, we propose \textbf{ACPO}, a policy optimization algorithm that aligns models with human preferences across both content quality and structural paradigms without supervised fine-tuning and ground-truth references. Empirical results demonstrate that AC-GenRM aligns closely with expert evaluations, while ACPO significantly enhances performance across diverse writing tasks. Crucially, our analysis reveals an emergent meta-cognitive ability: the model learns to autonomously differentiate between tasks requiring rigorous planning and those favoring direct generation, validating the effectiveness of our direct alignment approach.

AI.tldr: UniCreative：统一的无参考强化学习框架，通过自适应约束感知奖励模型和策略优化算法，解决长文本全局一致性与短文本局部表达性的创作张力问题。
AI.motivation: 创意写作面临核心挑战：长文本需要宏观规划以保持全局一致性，而短文本需要无约束的局部表达性。现有对齐方法依赖静态奖励信号和高质量监督数据，成本高且难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出UniCreative统一框架：1) AC-GenRM自适应约束感知奖励模型，动态合成查询特定标准进行细粒度偏好判断；2) ACPO策略优化算法，无需监督微调和真实参考，直接对齐内容质量和结构范式的人类偏好。
AI.result: AC-GenRM与专家评估高度一致；ACPO显著提升多种写作任务性能。关键发现：模型涌现元认知能力，能自主区分需要严格规划的任务和适合直接生成的任务。
AI.conclusion: 提出的直接对齐方法有效解决了创作中的全局一致性与局部表达性张力，验证了无监督参考强化学习框架在创意写作任务中的可行性和优势。

title: Inventory of the 12 007 Low-Dimensional Pseudo-Boolean Landscapes Invariant to Rank, Translation, and Rotation
summary: Many randomized optimization algorithms are rank-invariant, relying solely on the relative ordering of solutions rather than absolute fitness values. We introduce a stronger notion of rank landscape invariance: two problems are equivalent if their ranking, but also their neighborhood structure and symmetries (translation and rotation), induce identical landscapes. This motivates the study of rank landscapes rather than individual functions. While prior work analyzed the rankings of injective function classes in isolation, we provide an exhaustive inventory of the invariant landscape classes for pseudo-Boolean functions of dimensions 1, 2, and 3, including non-injective cases. Our analysis reveals 12,007 classes in total, a significant reduction compared to rank-invariance alone. We find that non-injective functions yield far more invariant landscape classes than injective ones. In addition, complex combinations of topological landscape properties and algorithm behaviors emerge, particularly regarding deceptiveness, neutrality, and the performance of hill-climbing strategies. The inventory serves as a resource for pedagogical purposes and benchmark design, offering a foundation for constructing larger problems with controlled hardness and advancing our understanding of landscape difficulty and algorithm performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种比传统秩不变性更强的"秩景观不变性"概念，对伪布尔函数的1、2、3维情况进行了全面分类，发现了12,007个不变景观类别，揭示了非单射函数比单射函数产生更多不变类别，并分析了景观拓扑特性与算法行为的关系。
AI.motivation: 许多随机优化算法仅依赖于解的相对排序而非绝对适应度值（秩不变性）。作者认为需要更强的概念来考虑邻域结构和对称性（平移和旋转），从而研究秩景观而非单个函数，为理解景观难度和算法性能提供更坚实的基础。
AI.method: 引入秩景观不变性概念：两个问题等价当且仅当它们的排序、邻域结构和对称性（平移和旋转）诱导出相同的景观。对伪布尔函数的1、2、3维情况（包括非单射情况）进行了详尽的分类分析，建立了不变景观类别的完整清单。
AI.result: 发现了12,007个不变景观类别，相比仅考虑秩不变性有显著减少。非单射函数产生的不可变景观类别远多于单射函数。揭示了复杂的景观拓扑特性（欺骗性、中性等）与爬山算法性能之间的关联模式。
AI.conclusion: 该清单可作为教学资源和基准设计工具，为构建具有可控难度的大型问题提供基础，推进对景观难度和算法性能的理解。秩景观分析比传统秩不变性分析提供了更精细的问题分类，有助于更深入地理解优化问题的本质结构。

title: Experience Transfer for Multimodal LLM Agents in Minecraft Game
summary: Multimodal LLM agents operating in complex game environments must continually reuse past experience to solve new tasks efficiently. In this work, we propose Echo, a transfer-oriented memory framework that enables agents to derive actionable knowledge from prior interactions rather than treating memory as a passive repository of static records. To make transfer explicit, Echo decomposes reusable knowledge into five dimensions: structure, attribute, process, function, and interaction. This formulation allows the agent to identify recurring patterns shared across different tasks and infer what prior experience remains applicable in new situations. Building on this formulation, Echo leverages In-Context Analogy Learning (ICAL) to retrieve relevant experiences and adapt them to unseen tasks through contextual examples. Experiments in Minecraft show that, under a from-scratch learning setting, Echo achieves a 1.3x to 1.7x speed-up on object-unlocking tasks. Moreover, Echo exhibits a burst-like chain-unlocking phenomenon, rapidly unlocking multiple similar items within a short time interval after acquiring transferable experience. These results suggest that experience transfer is a promising direction for improving the efficiency and adaptability of multimodal LLM agents in complex interactive environments.

AI.tldr: Echo是一个面向迁移的记忆框架，通过将可重用知识分解为五个维度，使多模态LLM智能体能够从先前经验中推导可操作知识，在复杂游戏环境中实现经验迁移。
AI.motivation: 多模态LLM智能体在复杂游戏环境中需要持续重用过去经验来高效解决新任务。现有方法将记忆视为静态记录的被动存储库，缺乏有效的经验迁移机制。
AI.method: 提出Echo框架：1）将可重用知识分解为结构、属性、过程、功能和交互五个维度；2）使用上下文类比学习（ICAL）检索相关经验并通过上下文示例适应新任务。
AI.result: 在Minecraft实验中，从零开始学习设置下，Echo在对象解锁任务上实现1.3倍到1.7倍的加速。观察到爆发式链式解锁现象：获得可迁移经验后能在短时间内快速解锁多个相似物品。
AI.conclusion: 经验迁移是提高多模态LLM智能体在复杂交互环境中效率和适应性的有前景方向。Echo框架通过明确的迁移机制使智能体能够识别跨任务重复模式并推断先前经验的适用性。

title: A canonical generalization of OBDD
summary: We introduce Tree Decision Diagrams (TDD) as a model for Boolean functions that generalizes OBDD. They can be seen as a restriction of structured d-DNNF; that is, d-DNNF that respect a vtree $T$. We show that TDDs enjoy the same tractability properties as OBDD, such as model counting, enumeration, conditioning, and apply, and are more succinct. In particular, we show that CNF formulas of treewidth $k$ can be represented by TDDs of FPT size, which is known to be impossible for OBDD. We study the complexity of compiling CNF formulas into deterministic TDDs via bottom-up compilation and relate the complexity of this approach with the notion of factor width introduced by Bova and Szeider.

AI.tldr: TDD是布尔函数的新模型，推广了OBDD，作为结构化d-DNNF的限制，具有与OBDD相同的可处理性但更简洁，能对树宽k的CNF公式实现FPT大小表示。
AI.motivation: OBDD虽然具有模型计数、枚举等可处理性，但对某些结构（如树宽有界的CNF公式）无法实现固定参数可处理（FPT）大小的表示。需要一种既保持OBDD可处理性又更简洁的表示模型。
AI.method: 提出Tree Decision Diagrams（TDD）作为布尔函数模型，它是结构化d-DNNF（尊重vtree T）的限制形式。研究TDD的可处理性，证明其支持模型计数、枚举、条件化和应用操作。分析CNF公式编译为确定性TDD的复杂度，并与Bova和Szeider引入的因子宽度概念关联。
AI.result: TDD具有与OBDD相同的可处理性但更简洁。特别地，树宽为k的CNF公式可以用FPT大小的TDD表示，而这对OBDD是不可能的。通过自底向上编译方法，将编译复杂度与因子宽度概念联系起来。
AI.conclusion: TDD作为OBDD的推广，在保持可处理性的同时提供了更强的表达能力，特别是能够对树宽有界的CNF公式实现FPT大小的紧凑表示，解决了OBDD的局限性。

title: Label Effects: Shared Heuristic Reliance in Trust Assessment by Humans and LLM-as-a-Judge
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as automated evaluators (LLM-as-a-Judge). This work challenges its reliability by showing that trust judgments by LLMs are biased by disclosed source labels. Using a counterfactual design, we find that both humans and LLM judges assign higher trust to information labeled as human-authored than to the same content labeled as AI-generated. Eye-tracking data reveal that humans rely heavily on source labels as heuristic cues for judgments. We analyze LLM internal states during judgment. Across label conditions, models allocate denser attention to the label region than the content region, and this label dominance is stronger under Human labels than AI labels, consistent with the human gaze patterns. Besides, decision uncertainty measured by logits is higher under AI labels than Human labels. These results indicate that the source label is a salient heuristic cue for both humans and LLMs. It raises validity concerns for label-sensitive LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation, and we cautiously raise that aligning models with human preferences may propagate human heuristic reliance into models, motivating debiased evaluation and alignment.

AI.tldr: 研究发现LLM作为评估者时存在偏见：当信息标注为人类创作时，LLM和人类都给予更高信任度，即使内容完全相同。眼动追踪显示人类依赖来源标签作为启发式线索，LLM内部状态分析也显示类似模式。
AI.motivation: 挑战LLM作为自动评估者（LLM-as-a-Judge）的可靠性，揭示其信任判断受到披露的来源标签偏见影响。研究旨在验证人类和LLM是否都会基于来源标签而非内容质量做出判断，以及这种偏见如何体现在LLM的内部状态中。
AI.method: 采用反事实设计，将相同内容分别标注为人类创作和AI生成，比较人类和LLM的信任评估。使用眼动追踪技术分析人类注意力模式，同时分析LLM内部状态（注意力分配和决策不确定性）。
AI.result: 1. 人类和LLM评估者对标注为人类创作的内容给予显著更高的信任度；2. 眼动追踪显示人类严重依赖来源标签作为启发式线索；3. LLM内部状态分析显示：模型对标签区域的注意力密度高于内容区域，且人类标签条件下的标签主导性更强；4. AI标签条件下的决策不确定性（通过logits测量）更高。
AI.conclusion: 来源标签是影响人类和LLM信任判断的显著启发式线索。这引发了标签敏感的LLM-as-a-Judge评估的有效性问题，并警示将模型与人类偏好对齐可能将人类的启发式依赖传播给模型，需要去偏见的评估和对齐方法。

title: Beyond Behavior: Why AI Evaluation Needs a Cognitive Revolution
summary: In 1950, Alan Turing proposed replacing the question "Can machines think?" with a behavioral test: if a machine's outputs are indistinguishable from those of a thinking being, the question of whether it truly thinks can be set aside. This paper argues that Turing's move was not only a pragmatic simplification but also an epistemological commitment, a decision about what kind of evidence counts as relevant to intelligence attribution, and that this commitment has quietly constrained AI research for seven decades. We trace how Turing's behavioral epistemology became embedded in the field's evaluative infrastructure, rendering unaskable a class of questions about process, mechanism, and internal organization that cognitive psychology, neuroscience, and related disciplines learned to ask. We draw a structural parallel to the behaviorist-to-cognitivist transition in psychology: just as psychology's commitment to studying only observable behavior prevented it from asking productive questions about internal mental processes until that commitment was abandoned, AI's commitment to behavioral evaluation prevents it from distinguishing between systems that achieve identical outputs through fundamentally different computational processes, a distinction on which intelligence attribution depends. We argue that the field requires an epistemological transition comparable to the cognitive revolution: not an abandonment of behavioral evidence, but a recognition that behavioral evidence alone is insufficient for the construct claims the field wishes to make. We articulate what a post-behaviorist epistemology for AI would involve and identify the specific questions it would make askable that the field currently has no way to ask.

AI.tldr: 论文认为图灵测试不仅是一种实用简化，更是一种认识论承诺，即仅通过行为输出判断智能，这种承诺限制了AI研究70年，阻碍了对内部过程、机制和组织的研究，需要类似心理学从行为主义到认知主义的认识论转变。
AI.motivation: 论文旨在揭示图灵测试背后的认识论承诺如何长期约束AI研究，使其无法提出关于智能系统内部过程、机制和组织结构的关键问题，而这些问题是认知心理学、神经科学等相关学科已经能够探讨的。
AI.method: 通过历史分析追溯图灵行为认识论如何嵌入AI评估基础设施；与心理学行为主义到认知主义转变进行结构类比；论证行为证据不足以支持AI领域希望做出的建构性主张；阐述后行为主义认识论应包含的内容。
AI.result: 图灵的行为认识论使AI领域无法区分通过根本不同计算过程实现相同输出的系统，而这一区分对智能归因至关重要；当前AI评估框架排除了对过程、机制和内部组织的研究问题。
AI.conclusion: AI领域需要类似认知革命的认识论转变，不是放弃行为证据，而是认识到仅凭行为证据不足以支持智能建构主张；需要发展后行为主义认识论，使当前无法提出的关于内部计算过程的问题变得可探讨。

title: PECKER: A Precisely Efficient Critical Knowledge Erasure Recipe For Machine Unlearning in Diffusion Models
summary: Machine unlearning (MU) has become a critical technique for GenAI models' safe and compliant operation. While existing MU methods are effective, most impose prohibitive training time and computational overhead. Our analysis suggests the root cause lies in poorly directed gradient updates, which reduce training efficiency and destabilize convergence. To mitigate these issues, we propose PECKER, an efficient MU approach that matches or outperforms prevailing methods. Within a distillation framework, PECKER introduces a saliency mask to prioritize updates to parameters that contribute most to forgetting the targeted data, thereby reducing unnecessary gradient computation and shortening overall training time without sacrificing unlearning efficacy. Our method generates samples that unlearn related class or concept more quickly, while closely aligning with the true image distribution on CIFAR-10 and STL-10 datasets, achieving shorter training times for both class forgetting and concept forgetting.

AI.tldr: PECKER是一种高效的机器遗忘方法，通过引入显著性掩码优先更新对目标数据遗忘贡献最大的参数，减少不必要的梯度计算，缩短训练时间，同时保持遗忘效果。
